  children={"Create a new external payroll for a company"}

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/companies/{company_uuid}/external_payrolls"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new external payroll for the company.

scope: `external_payrolls:write`
